---

Great salespeople invest in their education, they invest in their development, they invest in their personal motivation. Look they know these are their tools. The tools of their craft are to be excited, to be educated, to know more than everyone else. The average salesperson hasn't read a book. They don't stay connected. They don't improve themselves while the greats continue to educate, continue to motivate themselves, continue to seek the edge. While basics, the basics of your business may not change, the great knows there's always a better way to do things, a faster way to do things, a more effective way to do things, and that's what they're looking for. The greats know that education is vital. Their mental, their physical state, and their spiritual and emotional state are vital to them staying ahead of the curve and to get that competitive edge.
